kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

test.name: TC_UI_06B Validate Negative Amount Transfer

kw.name: open app
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
opens the application

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/cleanDB path_url=/parabank/services/bank/cleanDB headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'Transfer Incomplete!' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'Transfer Incomplete!' but did not.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Validate transfer funds with negative amount(FAIL)
test.status: Page should have contained text 'Transfer Incomplete!' but did not.
